findings.description: `StandardFwHeaderDefinition` is referenced in the s3 configuration XML examples (基本設定 and 再送要求フラグ定義方法の変更) but is absent from s3 hints. It only appears in s1 hints. A query about `StandardFwHeaderDefinition` configuration would retrieve s1 (概要) instead of s3 (設定項目・拡張ポイント) where the actual XML setup is shown.
findings.source_evidence: 設定項目・拡張ポイント section contains: `<component name="fwHeaderDefinition" class="nablarch.fw.messaging.StandardFwHeaderDefinition">` in both the 基本設定 and 再送要求フラグ定義方法の変更 examples.
